data.content: Rejected in implementation_review. The submitted code does not meet the knot requirements. Violations: 1. [src/lib/agent-outcome-stats.ts] still uses ~/.config/foolery/logs for production writes instead of always storing detailed agent success-rate data in the application's working directory. 2. [src/lib/terminal-manager.ts] still counts same-step queue states and terminal states as successful iterations when exit code is 0, which exceeds the specified success definition. Validation completed during review: bun install --frozen-lockfile passed, bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed. bun run lint . was started but did not complete during the review window.
